name: meep-photonic-devices-baselines-v1
description: Baseline comparison suite for refined block-based photonic device optimization under matched MEEP budgets.
paper_hypothesis: Under the same refined MEEP device budgets, Bayesian optimization should outperform random search on average while preserving reproducibility artifacts.

baseline_notes: Compare Bayesian and random search under the same refined photonic-device budgets.
Use task-specific secondary metrics from the best run to judge whether score gains reflect useful device behavior.
Treat this as a block-parameter optimizer comparison, not a topology-optimization benchmark.
